text: Artificial intelligence is transforming many areas of life, but it also raises important ethical questions. One major concern is bias: AI systems can learn unfair patterns from data, leading to discrimination against certain groups. Fairness requires that these systems treat all individuals equally, regardless of race, gender, or background. Privacy is another key issue, as AI often relies on large amounts of personal data, which must be protected and used responsibly. Transparency means that people should understand how AI makes decisions, especially when these decisions affect their lives. Ultimately, responsible AI development balances technological progress with ethical considerations to benefit everyone.
